title: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper
description:
Scrape LinkedIn job postings via the public guest API. Set 🔍 Keywords + 📍 Location (or 🌍 geoIds) to start. Use incrementalMode + stateKey for cross-run delta pricing — never charged for already-seen jobs.

To start, provide 🔗 Start URLs to scrape specific pages. Set 💯 Max Results to control volume (0 = unlimited).

keywords.title: 🔍 Search keywords
keywords.description: Job search keywords (e.g. "software engineer", "nurse"). Leave blank to browse all jobs in the selected location.

location.title: 📍 Location
location.description: Free-text location (e.g. "Copenhagen, Denmark", "United States"). Use geoIds for higher precision.

geoIds.title: 🌍 LinkedIn geoIds
geoIds.description: Numeric LinkedIn geoIds (e.g. "103644278" = United States). Each geoId becomes a separate query, deduped on jobId.

regions.title: 🗺 ISO-2 region codes
regions.description: Two-letter country codes (e.g. "US", "GB", "DE"). Resolved to LinkedIn country geoIds. Use geoIds[] for unsupported markets.

regionPresets.title: 🌐 Region preset
regionPresets.description: Pre-defined country grouping. Combined with regions[] if both are set.

datePosted.title: 🗓 Date posted
datePosted.description: Filter by posting recency. "lastHour" is unique to this scraper.

salaryMin.title: 💰 Salary min
salaryMin.description: Minimum annual salary (USD). Mapped to LinkedIn's nearest f_SB2 bucket. Post-filtered exactly.

salaryMax.title: 💰 Salary max
salaryMax.description: Maximum annual salary. Post-filtered (LinkedIn has no native max filter).

salaryIncludeUnknown.title: Include jobs without salary
salaryIncludeUnknown.description: When salaryMin/Max set, include jobs with no salary data.

companies.title: 🏢 Company IDs to include
companies.description: Numeric LinkedIn companyIds (filter at API level).

easyApply.title: ⚡ Easy Apply only
easyApply.description: Restrict results to LinkedIn Easy Apply postings.

removeAgency.title: 🚫 Remove staffing agencies
removeAgency.description: Heuristic post-filter on company name ("recruitment", "staffing", etc.).

distance.title: 📏 Distance (km/mi)
distance.description: Search radius around location. LinkedIn auto-detects unit (miles in US/UK/CA/AU/NZ; km elsewhere).

sortBy.title: 📊 Sort
sortBy.description: Sort order. "recent" is recommended for incremental feeds.

startUrls.title: 🔗 Advanced: start URLs
startUrls.description: Direct LinkedIn job-search URLs. Supersedes structured query when set. Deferred to v0.5 — currently logged but not crawled.

proxyConfiguration.title: 🛡 Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Network egress configuration. The default uses Apify Proxy with whatever group your plan has available — switch to residential if you observe blocks.

linkedinHost.title: 🌐 LinkedIn host
linkedinHost.description: Subdomain (e.g. "www", "de"). Affects default geo-routing + UI labels.

outputLanguage.title: 🗣 Accept-Language
outputLanguage.description: HTTP Accept-Language header. Default en-US for parsing-cleanliness.

incrementalMode.title: 🔁 Incremental mode
incrementalMode.description: Persist seen-jobIds across runs; emit only NEW + UPDATED. Requires stateKey.

stateKey.title: 🔑 State key
stateKey.description: Optional stable identifier for the tracked search universe. Leave empty to auto-derive a stable identifier from your search inputs — different keyword/location/filter combinations get isolated state automatically.

outputMode.title: 📤 Output mode
outputMode.description: Which items to emit when in incrementalMode.

emitUnchanged.title: ♻️ Emit UNCHANGED items
emitUnchanged.description: Include items that haven't changed since last run.

emitExpired.title: ⚰️ Emit EXPIRED items
emitExpired.description: Include items that disappeared from search results.

skipReposts.title: Skip detected reposts
skipReposts.description: Suppress jobs with the same content as a previously-seen but inactive listing.

enrichDetails.title: 🔬 Enrich with detail page
enrichDetails.description: Fetch each job's detail page for full description, seniorityLevel, employmentType, jobFunction, industry, and applicantCount. Adds 1 HTTP request per job.

discoverRelated.title: 🔭 Expand via relatedJobs
discoverRelated.description: After the main SERP, fetch LinkedIn's relatedJobs feed for the first N results to discover jobs that don't surface on the keyword search. Useful for thin markets.

relatedSeedCount.title: relatedJobs seed count
relatedSeedCount.description: How many of the first SERP results are used as seeds for relatedJobs expansion. Each seed yields up to 10 candidates.

telegramToken.title: Telegram bot token
telegramToken.description: Bot token from @BotFather. Leave empty to disable Telegram notifications.

telegramChatId.title: 💬 Telegram chat ID
telegramChatId.description: Numeric chat or channel ID where notifications should be sent.

discordWebhookUrl.title: Discord webhook URL
discordWebhookUrl.description: Channel webhook URL. Leave empty to disable Discord notifications.

slackWebhookUrl.title: Slack webhook URL
slackWebhookUrl.description: Incoming webhook URL. Leave empty to disable Slack notifications.

whatsappAccessToken.title: WhatsApp Cloud API access token
whatsappAccessToken.description: Permanent System User token from Meta Business.

whatsappPhoneNumberId.title: WhatsApp phone-number ID
whatsappPhoneNumberId.description: Numeric phone-number ID from the Meta dashboard.

whatsappTo.title: WhatsApp recipient (E.164)
whatsappTo.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g. "4561234567").

webhookUrl.title: Generic webhook URL (n8n / Make / Zapier)
webhookUrl.description: Receives a JSON POST of {metadata, items} for each batch.

webhookHeaders.title: Webhook headers
webhookHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers to include with the generic webhook (e.g. Authorization).

notificationLimit.title: Max items per notification batch
notificationLimit.description: Cap on items included in each notification message.

notifyOnlyChanges.title: Notify only NEW/UPDATED
notifyOnlyChanges.description: When in incrementalMode, suppress notifications for UNCHANGED items.

compact.title: Compact output
compact.description: Emit only core fields (keeps cost the same; reduces dataset size).

descriptionMaxLength.title: Description max length
descriptionMaxLength.description: Truncate description (0 = no truncation). Only relevant when enrichDetails=true.

phoneExtractionMode.title: Phone-extraction mode
phoneExtractionMode.description: "strict" requires Tel:/+CC prefix; "lenient" also picks up bare local-format numbers.
